tasks.subject: Task 1: CSS variable token system
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Every color token becomes a CSS variable with dark (default) and light values; global.css's own hardcoded hex switches to the matching variable.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/styles/global.css (full replacement)
- Modify: tailwind.config.mjs (full replacement)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- npm run build succeeds.
- With no data-theme override, site renders identical to before (dark values copied verbatim).
- Setting data-theme=light in devtools recolors site-wide without reload.

**Verify:** cd abr-move && npm run build -> exits 0.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["abr-move/src/styles/global.css", "abr-move/tailwind.config.mjs"], "verifyCommand": "cd abr-move && npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["npm run build succeeds", "dark mode unchanged", "data-theme=light recolors site"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Blocking theme-init script in Layout.astro
tasks.description:
**Goal:** data-theme set on <html> before first paint from localStorage, defaulting to dark.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/layouts/Layout.astro

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- npm run build succeeds.
- With localStorage abr-move-theme=light, reload never flashes dark first.
- With no stored preference, html has data-theme=dark immediately.

**Verify:** cd abr-move && npm run build -> exits 0. Manual check in Task 6.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["abr-move/src/layouts/Layout.astro"], "verifyCommand": "cd abr-move && npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["npm run build succeeds", "no flash of wrong theme on reload"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Header.astro toggle button, dual logo, rename
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace Скачать CTA with sun/moon toggle visible at every breakpoint; dual logo variants; fix scroll-spy hardcoded color; rename hover:text-white to hover:text-gray-1.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/components/Header.astro (full replacement)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- npm run build succeeds.
- Скачать pill CTA gone from header (mobile dropdown button untouched).
- Sun/moon toggle between nav and hamburger, visible mobile and desktop.
- Click flips data-theme, updates theme-color meta, persists to localStorage.
- Both logo images in DOM, only one visible per theme.
- Active nav link uses var(--color-accent), not hardcoded cyan.

**Verify:** cd abr-move && npm run build -> exits 0. Manual check in Task 6.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["abr-move/src/components/Header.astro"], "verifyCommand": "cd abr-move && npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["npm run build succeeds", "toggle button present and functional", "dual logo present", "scroll-spy uses theme-aware color"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
tasks.activeForm: Building Header theme toggle and dual logo

tasks.activeForm: Adding Footer dual logo and rename

tasks.subject: Task 5: Rename text-white to text-gray-1 in remaining components
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Every remaining live text-white becomes text-gray-1; drop redundant group-hover:text-gray-1 in ModuleCard/News/Downloads; leave the two ЮMoney button spans in index.astro untouched.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/components/Hero.astro
- Modify: src/components/About.astro
- Modify: src/components/Solutions.astro
- Modify: src/components/ModuleCard.astro
- Modify: src/components/News.astro
- Modify: src/components/YouTubeCarousel.astro
- Modify: src/components/Downloads.astro
- Modify: src/pages/index.astro

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- npm run build succeeds.
- grep -rn text-white across the 7 component files returns nothing.
- grep -n text-white src/pages/index.astro returns exactly 2 matches (ЮMoney button).

**Verify:** cd abr-move && npm run build && grep -rn "text-white" src/components/Hero.astro src/components/About.astro src/components/Solutions.astro src/components/ModuleCard.astro src/components/News.astro src/components/YouTubeCarousel.astro src/components/Downloads.astro; grep -n "text-white" src/pages/index.astro

```json:metadata
{"files": ["abr-move/src/components/Hero.astro", "abr-move/src/components/About.astro", "abr-move/src/components/Solutions.astro", "abr-move/src/components/ModuleCard.astro", "abr-move/src/components/News.astro", "abr-move/src/components/YouTubeCarousel.astro", "abr-move/src/components/Downloads.astro", "abr-move/src/pages/index.astro"], "verifyCommand": "cd abr-move && npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["npm run build succeeds", "no text-white in 7 component files", "exactly 2 text-white matches in index.astro (YuMoney button)"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Verify whole site in both themes
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Confirm theme toggle works end-to-end and dark mode is unregressed.

**Files:** none (verification only; fix forward in the relevant file if something's broken).

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- npm run build succeeds.
- Dark mode identical to before this plan.
- Toggle switches whole page to light instantly: bg, text, borders, both logos, amber/emerald/violet tags, accent buttons, active-nav underline, hover states.
- Reload after toggling to light stays light, no dark flash.
- Toggle visible/clickable at 375px viewport.
- QR/YuMoney modal opens/closes in both themes, brand-purple button stays fixed purple.
- dist/news.json still returns [].

**Verify:** cd abr-move && npm run build -> exits 0. Manual walkthrough via npm run dev at 375px and 1440px, toggling theme at each.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "cd abr-move && npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["npm run build succeeds", "dark mode unregressed", "toggle recolors entire page", "no flash on reload", "toggle visible on mobile", "modal works both themes", "news.json still []"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
